asset_name: Tutorial, tooltip, first-run guidance, and control prompt UI
notes: 2026-05-08 human review: candidate_06 soft-alpha output accepted as good. Legal/license review and runtime integration remain blocked pending final approval. 2026-05-08 human approval: asset cleared for integration; runtime integration not yet performed.
final_prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: Matchatro game UI tutorial onboarding pack source image for chroma-key extraction
Primary request: Regenerate tutorial_onboarding_ui_pack candidate_06 as a clean fantasy roguelite tutorial UI kit on one 1536x1024 canvas.
Scene/backdrop: perfectly flat solid chroma-key background color #FF00FF covering every background pixel. No checkerboard, no transparency, no gradient, no texture, no shadows on the background.
Subject: separated tutorial/onboarding UI components: one large empty tutorial dialogue panel, one smaller hint panel, one compact input/control hint strip, a hand-tap gesture icon with arrow, a circular highlight ring, a confirm/continue button, one question badge, one warning badge. Dark stone panels with gold trim and cyan jewel accents matching existing Matchatro fantasy UI style.
Style/medium: polished hand-painted 2D game UI asset sheet, crisp edges, production-ready icons and panels.
Composition/framing: components separated with generous gaps, no overlap, no cropping, no text labels or letters. Keep all objects fully inside canvas with 48 px safe margin.
Color palette: black stone, dark charcoal, warm gold trim, cyan jewels, teal button fill, red/orange warning. Do not use magenta, pink, purple, or #FF00FF anywhere inside the UI components, glows, reflections, jewels, shadows, or antialiasing.
Lighting/mood: clean readable high fantasy UI, subtle internal highlights only on the assets.
Constraints: opaque chroma-key source only; background must be flat #FF00FF; asset elements must not contain magenta or pink; no leftover magenta artifact inside any component; no embedded text, no watermark, no mockup screen, no poster layout.
Avoid: transparent background request, checkerboard, gradients in background, key-color spill, magenta/pink/purple details, labels, words, numbers, UI text.
generation_mode: built-in imagegen chroma-key fallback plus deterministic adaptive extraction
